calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Informal Account

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Informal Account
Off Calendar Mar-25-2025 Continued To Apr-27-27 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Brianna Mannion appeared via zoom for SF Public Administrator (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding informal accountings of the reserve account, that the monies are being held in an estate account with J.P. Morgan, that the reserve will sit there until its set to expire in 2028. First and final account and report of administrator etc., is taken under submission with the intent to grant. Status of informal account is set for March 25, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Papers to be filed by March 11, 2025.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrera. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR The Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-08-2023 Continued To Aug-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion appeared by zoom for San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mrs. Mannion thanked the probate examiner for his hard work on this and stated that she completely agrees with the property adjustment, that she can include the examiner's appreciation adjustments and that she can provide a revised order. The Petition to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate is under submission with the court's intent to approve as revised by the examiner.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Probate Examiner: Aeyoung Kim. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-02-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-05-2022 Continued To Aug-02-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2375 33rd Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94116-2202)
Off Calendar Jan-05-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Boessenecker appeared by zoom for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The sale was confirmed at $1,606,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed October 8, 2021. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is under submission with the court's intent to grant (subject to receipt and review of the order). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
